title: EDPB and EDPS support strengthening EU’s cybersecurity and easing compliance while protecting individuals’ personal data
summary: Brussels, 19 March 2026 – The European Data Protection Board (EDPB) and the European Data Protection Supervisor (EDPS) have adopted a Joint Opinion on the European Commission’s proposal for a Cybersecurity Act 2 (CSA2) and the proposal on amendments to the Network and Information Security 2 (NIS2) D...
